hwanhan haetsari bureowa

마지막 단 한 번
그래 너를 믿고 앞으로 가

움츠렸던 어깨를 펴고
첫발을 디딘 순간

작은 심장 소리

서둘러 꽃은 피겠지만
조급해 하지는 마

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Sookyung Jun - Remember (feat. Gabriel)

Romanization

Stopped in my track
When I read your letter
Why does it hurt worse
When the memory’s better?

Tears in my eyes
Every time I remember
The trips to the suburbs
When we needed fresh air

But those days are gone
Gone ‘til forever
I can’t turn back time
There’s no room for regret
‘Cause you flow like a river
You change like the weather
Remember
Is all I can get

So tell me I’m wrong
That it’s my imagination
Did you slip me something?
Am I hallucinating?

Don’t want to believe
That you’re really departed
I reach out to touch you
And it doesn’t seem fair

‘Cause those days are gone
Gone for no reason
I can’t turn back time
There’s no room to retry
‘Cause you flow like a river
You change like a season
Remember
Is how I get by

Yeah

So I’ll carry on living
With a piece of me missing
I know it’ll be different
But it can’t hurt to try
And, baby, I’ll carry on loving
The distant recall
Of what I always wanted
I won’t break my promise
I promise (I promise…)

Stopped in my track
When I read your letter
The voice of your cursive
Made everything better

And our day is gone
Gone ‘til forever
I can’t turn back time
I’m just grateful it passed
‘Cause you flow like a river
You change like the weather
Remember
The love we once had

Hangeul

Stopped in my track
When I read your letter
Why does it hurt worse
When the memory’s better?

Tears in my eyes
Every time I remember
The trips to the suburbs
When we needed fresh air

But those days are gone
Gone ‘til forever
I can’t turn back time
There’s no room for regret
‘Cause you flow like a river
You change like the weather
Remember
Is all I can get

So tell me I’m wrong
That it’s my imagination
Did you slip me something?
Am I hallucinating?

Don’t want to believe
That you’re really departed
I reach out to touch you
And it doesn’t seem fair

‘Cause those days are gone
Gone for no reason
I can’t turn back time
There’s no room to retry
‘Cause you flow like a river
You change like a season
Remember
Is how I get by

Yeah

So I’ll carry on living
With a piece of me missing
I know it’ll be different
But it can’t hurt to try
And, baby, I’ll carry on loving
The distant recall
Of what I always wanted
I won’t break my promise
I promise (I promise…)

Stopped in my track
When I read your letter
The voice of your cursive
Made everything better

And our day is gone
Gone ‘til forever
I can’t turn back time
I’m just grateful it passed
‘Cause you flow like a river
You change like the weather
Remember
The love we once had
